description_long: This is a compact, floor-standing bookcase with a dark wood finish and a modern, functional design. The front features four open cubby-style shelves, each with a slightly curved side profile, ideal for displaying newspapers, magazines, or books. The top section has two angled display panels, each holding a newspaper, making it suitable for public or communal spaces. The bookcase is mounted on four small caster wheels, allowing for easy mobility across flat surfaces. The back and sides are solid, with the sides exhibiting a gentle curve that adds a touch of elegance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth, polished wood grain surface.
description: A dark wood, mobile bookcase with four open shelves and angled top display panels, designed for easy access and public display of reading materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and two angled display panels holding newspapers, with visible caster wheels at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved side panel and the depth of the shelves, as well as the thickness of the wood.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back with a central vertical split at the top, and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the curved side panel and the profile of the angled display panels.
